summary: Tested image migration to ihgbrands CDN and Admin File Manager feature. All backend APIs return CDN URLs (files.ihgbrands.com/lexa/), no Emergent URLs found in product responses. File Manager page (/admin/images) fully functional with 735 files, search, category filters, grid/list views, and file detail panel.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing migrated files for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 735 files migrated to remote server (files.ihgbrands.com/lexa/). File Manager admin page at /admin/images shows all files with search, category filters, grid/list views, and detail panel. All product images in catalog use CDN URLs. Next.js image optimization proxies CDN URLs via /_next/image. Backend endpoint /api/uploads/management/list is cached for 5 min.

backend: No Emergent URLs in product responses ✓
File metadata includes: filename, category, url, size, modified, content_type, extension ✓
File URLs point to files.ihgbrands.com CDN ✓
Categories returned: migrated, products, articles, etc. ✓
frontend: Homepage loads without Emergent image URLs ✓
/products page shows 217 products with CDN images ✓
Product images served via Next.js image optimization proxy ✓
File Manager shows stats: 735 files, 580.1 MB, 732 images, 3 docs ✓
Category filter buttons work (All, Products, Migrated, etc.) ✓
Search input filters files by filename ✓
List view shows file rows with details ✓
File detail panel opens on click ✓
Detail panel shows: filename, URL, size, type, category, modified date ✓
URLs in detail panel are from files.ihgbrands.com CDN ✓

migration_verification.emergent_urls_found: None in tested pages and API responses
